fix.item: Improved search relevance so exact template element matches, such as Cassiopeia, are listed before partial matches such as Cassiopeia Extended.
Clarified search wording to show that users search template groups and select module position values.
Changed the selected position badge text to Current value to avoid confusion when the same module position exists in multiple template groups.
Added template element badges to template group headings for clearer distinction between similar template names.

update.item: Updated administrator JavaScript and language strings for clearer template group search behavior.

security.item: Added LICENSE.txt to the install package for GPL/JED compliance.
Hardened templateDetails.xml parsing with libxml internal errors and LIBXML_NONET.

fix.item: Removed automatic plugin enable installer script from the install package.
Added modal double-open protection and safer body modal-open handling.
Added explicit manifest element value and synchronized asset versions.

update.item: Added Joomla update server metadata to the extension manifest.
Added Joomla changelog URL to the extension manifest and update stream.
Prepared official update stream metadata for GitHub Releases distribution.
Initial stable release of JT Position Finder.
Added template-grouped position browsing with search, usage badges and custom position input.
